ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , '!begining_of_contract_1!' as adtm_date_from, '!begining_of_contract_2!' as adtm_date_to, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date , to_date('2020-9-2 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as adtm_date_from, to_date('2020-9-2 0:0:0','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as adtm_date_to, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ,
( select nvl(sum(fund_new),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_new where sc_lon_m_req_fund_new.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) as fund_new
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 ) as fund_ret
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no = 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_old
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_real),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_ret_50
, ( select nvl(sum(fund_int),0) from sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret where sc_lon_m_req_fund_ret.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no and fund_ret > 0 and deposit_account_no <> 'NEW' ) as fund_int_50,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, FPA_LON_REQ_REFINANCE_AMT(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) as refinance ,sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status ,sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ) as loan_type_description
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch, si_security_user WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = si_security_user.user_id) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id )
and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '1' ) and (sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1')
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no

r_ktm_loan_create_acc_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code, ( case collateral_type_code when '01' then PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) when '02' then 'ใช้หุ้นค้ำประกัน' when '03' then 'เงินฝากเลขที่ '||ref_own_no else 'ที่ดินเลขที่ '||collateral_description end) as case_collateral_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )
